word: G204 - ἀκρογωνιαῖος - akrogōniaîos - ak-rog-o-nee-ah'-yos - Chief corner

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀκρογωνιαῖος

- Transliteration: Akrogoniaios

- Phonetic: ak-rog-o-nee-ah'-yos

- Definition:

1. placed at an extreme corner, the corner foundation stone

- Origin: from G206 and G1137

- TDNT entry: 14:12,1

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G206 and G1137; belonging to the extreme corner: - chief corner.
